working_links.text: Entity Relationship Diagram showing the core Chinook database schema with Artists, Albums, and Tracks entities integrated with the aliziodev/laravel-taxonomy package. The diagram shows polymorphic relationships between Terms and all Chinook entities through the Termables pivot table, enabling flexible categorization without custom Category models.
